criterion_description: Full event/tick lifecycle replay covers every supported strategy/profile/fill model.
acceptance_threshold: all supported strategies have preserved order/fill lineage

criterion_description: Daily equity, halt, resume and blocked-trading state is persisted from the replay engine.
acceptance_threshold: daily risk state is complete and reconciled to lifecycle fills

criterion_description: Daily loss, drawdown and position guardrails are enforced and validated on replay state.
acceptance_threshold: no unresolved deployable guardrail breach before promotion

criterion_description: Tail-loss distribution is computed from replay fills under current and strict profiles.
acceptance_threshold: tail loss remains within approved capital limits

criterion_description: Documented Zerodha formula evidence is retained and reconciled to broker notes where available.
acceptance_threshold: documented formula plus broker contract-note reconciliation clears

criterion_description: Latency/slippage stress is replayed through the event lifecycle engine.
acceptance_threshold: retail and stressed profiles pass under calibrated latency/slippage

criterion_description: Retail and stressed profiles remain net-positive after realistic costs.
acceptance_threshold: retail/stress and stressed-only net profitability pass

criterion_description: Economic P&L and lifecycle risk state jointly pass.
acceptance_threshold: risk-adjusted economic joint pass clears for deployable profiles
